_publications._publicationTitle: Optical coherence tomography of the macular ganglion cell layer in children with neurofibromatosis type 1 is a useful tool in the assessment for optic pathway gliomas.

_contextSnippet: A slight but significant decline in GC-IPL was observed in the NF1-OPG group (slope -0.1207μm/trimester, p = 0.004)...All three groups showed a thinning in pRNFL over time, however reaching statistical significance in NF1-OPG group (slope -0.7211μm/trimester, p<0.001)
resourceName: repeated measure correlation (rmc) script in R
details: Successfully detected significant decline in GC-IPL over time in NF1-OPG group (slope -0.1207μm/trimester, p=0.004) and pRNFL thinning (slope -0.7211μm/trimester, p<0.001)
